title: Shri Ganesh ji ki aarti
intro: Read Shri Ganesh Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Ganesha.
description:
Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh,
Jai Ganesh Deva.
Mata jaki Parvati,
Pita Mahadeva॥
॥ Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva ॥

Ekadant, dayavant,
Char bhuja dhari.
Mathe par tilak sohe,
Mushak ki savari॥
॥ Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva ॥

Andhan ko aankh det,
Kodhin ko kaya.
Banjhan ko putra det,
Nirdhan ko maya॥
॥ Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva ॥

Haar chadhe, phool chadhe,
Aur chadhe meva.
Ladduvan ka bhog lage,
Sant karen seva॥
॥ Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva ॥

Deenan ki laaj rakho,
Shambhu sutvari.
Kamna ko pura karo,
Jaun balihari॥
॥ Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva ॥

Mata jaki Parvati,
Pita Mahadeva॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Lord Ganesh’s Aarti?
faq.a1: Lord Ganesh is known as 'Vighnaharta' (the remover of obstacles). The primary purpose of performing his Aarti is to seek his blessings to remove hurdles before starting any task and to attain wisdom, knowledge, and success.
faq.q2: Which is the best day to perform Ganesh Aarti?
faq.a2: Wednesday is dedicated to Lord Ganesh, making it the most auspicious day for his Aarti. Additionally, it is performed with great devotion on Chaturthi Tithi and throughout the festival of Ganesh Utsav.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) should be made during Ganesh Aarti?
faq.a3: Lord Ganesh is extremely fond of 'Modaks' and 'Laddus'. Offering these after the Aarti is considered highly auspicious. Offering Durva grass (green grass) and red flowers is also very pleasing to him.
faq.q4: Is it necessary to perform Aarti before starting any new task?
faq.a4: According to scriptures, Lord Ganesh is 'Pratham Pujya' (the first to be worshipped). Therefore, performing his Vandana and Aarti before starting any new work, puja, or ritual is considered essential to ensure that the task is completed without any obstacles.
faq.q5: Which mantras should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: After the Aarti, chanting the mantra 'Vakratunda Mahakaya Suryakoti Samaprabha' and remembering the 12 names of Lord Ganesh is considered very auspicious, as it helps in keeping the mind focused and calm.
